lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Nick had been eagerly awaiting his birthday for weeks, but he never imagined it would be this special. As he tore open the brightly wrapped gift from his uncle, his eyes widened in amazement. What did he tore open?

translations.Somali: Nick wuxuu si weyn u sugayay dhalashadiisa usbuucyo, laakiin waligiis ma uusan maleynin inay noqon doonto mid gaar ah. Markuu furaashka dhalaalaya ee hadiyadda ka soo bixiyay adeerkiis, indhihiisu waxay ku sii ballaadhmeen yaab. Maxuu furaashka ka soo bixiyay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: The gift, right. Inside was a gleaming Beyblade, made from stainless steel, its intricate design reflecting the sunlight streaming into the room. Nick couldn't wait to see it in action. What did he find inside?

translations.Somali: Hadiyadda, sax. Gudaha waxaa ku jiray Beyblade dhalaalaya, oo laga sameeyay bir aan miridhku qaban, naqshaddeeda adagna ay ka turjumeyso iftiinka qorraxda ee qolka soo galaya. Nick ma sugi karin inuu arko iyadoo shaqeynaysa. Maxuu gudaha ka helay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: A gleaming Beyblade. After thanking his uncle with a big hug, Nick grabbed the Beyblade and dashed outside to the backyard. Where did he go with his new gift?

translations.Somali: Beyblade dhalaalaya. Kadib markuu adeerkiis ku mahadceliyay hab weyn, Nick wuxuu qaatay Beyblade-kii oo wuxuu ku orday bannaanka dambe ee guriga. Xagee ayuu aaday hadiyaddiisa cusub?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: To the backyard - that's right. The grass was freshly cut, and the air was filled with the scent of summer. He found a flat spot and set up the portable Beyblade arena his parents had bought him last year. He set up what?

translations.Somali: Bannaanka dambe - sax. Cawska ayaa si fiican loo jaray, hawaduna waxay ka buuxday urta xagaaga. Wuxuu helay meel siman oo uu ka dhisay goobta lagu ciyaaro Beyblade ee la qaadan karo ee waalidkiis ay usoo iibiyeen sanadkii hore. Wuxuu dhisay maxay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: A portable Beyblare arena. He wanted to see the toy in action. —Let's see what you can do— Nick muttered to himself as he positioned the Beyblade in the launcher. Where did he position it?

translations.Somali: Goobta lagu ciyaaro Beyblade ee la qaadan karo. Wuxuu rabay inuu arko alaabta isagoo shaqeynaysa. —Aan aragno waxaad qaban karto— Nick ayaa isku yiri isagoo Beyblade-kii ku dhejinaya ridaha. Xagee ayuu ku dhejiyay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: In the launcher. With a swift pull of the ripcord, the Beyblade shot into the arena, spinning with a fierce energy. It glinted in the sunlight, moving with precision and power. Nick watched, mesmerized, as it collided with his old plastic Beyblade, sending it flying out of the arena.

translations.Somali: Ku ridaha. Markuu si dhaqso leh u jiiday xadhigga, Beyblade-ku wuxuu galay goobta, isagoo ku wareegaya tamar xoog leh. Waxay ku iftiimisay iftiinka qorraxda, iyadoo si sax ah oo awood leh u dhaqaaqeysa. Nick ayaa daawanayay, isagoo la dhacay, markii ay ku dhacday Beyblade-kii hore ee caagga ahaa, taasoo ka tuurtay goobta.
